description: Demonstrate Alembic-managed DDL migrations for Metaxy feature tables with DuckLake.

events.command: uv run alembic revision --autogenerate -m "create feature tables"

events.stdout:
Alembic + DuckLake pipeline
  auto_create_tables: False
  Wrote 2 rows for examples/alembic_demo
  Feature table: examples__alembic_demo
  Read back:
    clip_001: s3://demo-bucket/processed/clip_001.parquet
    clip_002: s3://demo-bucket/processed/clip_002.parquet
